ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( AND( TEXT(Uniform__c) = "Scrub Shirt", TEXT(Type__c) = "Womens", NOT( OR(TEXT(Size__c) = "6", TEXT(Size__c) = "8", TEXT(Size__c) = "10", TEXT(Size__c) = "12", TEXT(Size__c) = "14", TEXT(Size__c) = "16") ) ), AND( TEXT(Uniform__c) = "Scrub Shirt", TEXT(Type__c) = "Unisex", NOT( OR(TEXT(Size__c) = "XS", TEXT(Size__c) = "S", TEXT(Size__c) = "M", TEXT(Size__c) = "L", TEXT(Size__c) = "XL", TEXT(Size__c) = "2XL") ) ), AND( TEXT(Uniform__c) = "Polo Shirt", TEXT(Type__c) = "Womens", NOT( OR(TEXT(Size__c) = "6", TEXT(Size__c) = "8", TEXT(Size__c) = "10", TEXT(Size__c) = "12", TEXT(Size__c) = "14", TEXT(Size__c) = "16", TEXT(Size__c) = "22", TEXT(Size__c) = "24") ) ), AND( TEXT(Uniform__c) = "Polo Shirt", TEXT(Type__c) = "Unisex", NOT( OR(TEXT(Size__c) = "S", TEXT(Size__c) = "M", TEXT(Size__c) = "L", TEXT(Size__c) = "XL", TEXT(Size__c) = "2XL", TEXT(Size__c) = "3XL") ) ), AND( TEXT(Uniform__c) = "Scrub Pants", TEXT(Type__c) = "Regular Length", NOT( OR(TEXT(Size__c) = "XS", TEXT(Size__c) = "S", TEXT(Size__c) = "M", TEXT(Size__c) = "L", TEXT(Size__c) = "XL", TEXT(Size__c) = "2XL", TEXT(Size__c) = "3XL") ) ), AND( TEXT(Uniform__c) = "Scrub Pants", TEXT(Type__c) = "Long Length", NOT( OR(TEXT(Size__c) = "XS", TEXT(Size__c) = "S", TEXT(Size__c) = "M", TEXT(Size__c) = "L", TEXT(Size__c) = "XL", TEXT(Size__c) = "2XL", TEXT(Size__c) = "3XL") ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Select the correct size for the selected Uniform and Type.
